dedupe_policy: publisher + article_id + title + product_or_device_scope + error_signature_if_any + source_url + canonical_id

records.title: Troubleshooting Windows unexpected restarts and stop code errors
records.error_signature_if_any: Unexpected restart or Windows stop code error
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows unexpected restarts, blue/black screens and stop-code error troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Microsoft article and supported Windows contexts; not proof of a hardware or driver root cause.

records.title: Fix Bluetooth problems in Windows
records.error_signature_if_any: Bluetooth not pairing, Bluetooth audio issue, missing Bluetooth or related Bluetooth problem
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for common Windows Bluetooth problems.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; adapter/vendor driver details remain device-specific.

records.title: Fix Wi-Fi connection issues in Windows
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows Wi-Fi connection troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; network infrastructure and driver details require local validation.

records.title: Fix Ethernet connection problems in Windows
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows Ethernet connection troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; cable, router and NIC state need local validation.

records.title: Error codes in Device Manager in Windows
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Device Manager error-code interpretation and suggested next steps.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Device Manager codes; not a universal device diagnosis.

records.limitations: Scope-limited to Apple article and supported macOS contexts; router/ISP state requires local validation.

records.limitations: Scope-limited to display behavior and article text; cable/adapter/display hardware can vary.
